# webViewDidChange(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sent by the default notification center when the user changes content in the web view.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func webViewDidChange(_ notification: Notification!)
```

## Parameters

- **notification**: Always set to [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebViewDidChangeNotification]. You can retrieve the `WebView` object by sending `object` to `notification`.

## Related Documentation

- **webView(_:shouldInsert:replacing:given:)**: Returns whether the user should be allowed to insert a node in place of a range of content.
- **webView(_:shouldInsertText:replacing:given:)**: Returns whether a user should be allowed to insert text in place of a range of content.
- **webView(_:shouldDelete:)**: Returns whether the user should be allowed to delete a range of content.
